top_signals.title: Oil prices head to weekly loss as U.S. and Iran signal progress toward a deal
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran have signaled progress in talks to end the war, but the warring sides remain at loggerheads over key issues.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Keynote speech by Commissioner Kubilius at the event of the 25th anniversary of the European Union Military Committee
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 21 May 2026 Good afternoon.
The ancient Greeks had a saying about war: War is the father of all things, even of instruments for peace.
The EUMC was forged in the dark shado...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nagasaki officials conduct annual air ventilation of A-bomb victim register
top_signals.summary: The register, which records the names of 202,053 victims, was exposed to the air to remove moisture after municipal employees offered a silent prayer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
